vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided sequence. My first step was to establish the spatial orientation of the pots relative to the white rabbit anchor. Upon validation, I confirmed that the pots are devoid of the expected botanical specimens (P1-P4). The soil appears consistent across all images, showing no signs of germination, growth, or decay. The environment is currently a 'dead' biome, with the white rabbit acting as the sole occupant of the desk space. The current image shows a significant drop in ambient light, further confirming the absence of any reflective leaf surfaces.
